Off Calendar Aug-24-2020 Continued To Sep-28-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Teresa Norton, Esq., counsel for Roni Simon, Petitioner (appearing by video conferencing).

[This matter was not on calendar as it was continued to September 28, 2020]

Ms. Norton appears to contest the tentative ruling and to advise the Court that the continuance date is too long. The Court notes that the continuance was occasioned by the untimely submission of courtesy copies for the Examiner's review. As the matter is not properly before the Court at this time, counsel will need to file an ex parte application to advance the hearing date.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Reporter: Not Reported. (D204)
